hero.title: Your voice journal,
hero.subtitle: Record your day in 2 minutes. AI analyzes your emotions, tracks your mood, and reveals patterns to help you understand yourself better.

features.title: Everything you need to understand yourself
features.subtitle: A complete toolkit for emotional self-awareness, powered by cutting-edge AI.

items.title: Voice Recording
items.description: Record your thoughts in just 2 minutes. Sessions from 10 seconds to 10 minutes, captured in high-quality audio.

items.title: AI Emotion Analysis
items.description: Powered by Gemini 2.0 Flash, your entries are analyzed for 6 core emotions with a mood score from 1 to 10.

items.title: Mood Tracking
items.description: Visualize your emotional journey with 30-day graphs, radar charts, and an interactive mood calendar.

items.title: Weekly Insights
items.description: Get AI-generated weekly reports with emotional patterns, trends, and personalized suggestions.

items.title: Badges & Gamification
items.description: Unlock 11+ achievements, maintain streaks, and earn color themes as you build your journaling habit.

items.title: Daily Prompts
items.description: 30 guided questions to help you reflect deeper when you're not sure what to talk about.

howItWorks.title: Simple as 1, 2, 3
howItWorks.subtitle: From recording to insights in minutes. No effort required.

steps.title: Record
steps.description: Talk about your day for 2 minutes. No typing needed — just press record and speak naturally.

steps.title: AI Analyzes
steps.description: Our AI transcribes your voice, detects emotions, assigns a mood score, and generates personalized insights.

steps.title: Get Insights
steps.description: Track your emotional patterns over time with beautiful charts, weekly reports, and actionable suggestions.

testimonials.title: Loved by thousands
testimonials.subtitle: See what our community says about their journaling journey.

items.name: Sophie M.
items.text: I've tried written journals for years but never stuck with them. Speaking feels so much more natural. The AI insights have helped me understand my anxiety triggers.

items.name: Thomas L.
items.text: The mood tracking graphs are incredible. I can see exactly how work stress affects my weekends. It's like having a therapist in my pocket.

items.name: Camille R.
items.text: The daily prompts are perfect when I don't know what to say. I've been journaling for 45 days straight — my longest streak ever!

items.name: Marc D.
items.text: Weekly insights showed me a pattern I never noticed: my mood drops every Monday. Now I prep with a morning routine and it's made a huge difference.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing

free.name: Free

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about VoiceJournal AI.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. All your journal entries are stored securely on Firebase with end-to-end encryption. Only you can access your data — we never read, share, or sell your personal entries.

items.question: How does the AI analysis work?
items.answer: We use Google's Gemini 2.0 Flash model to transcribe your voice, detect emotions (joy, sadness, anger, fear, surprise, disgust), and generate a mood score from 1-10. The AI also provides personalized insights and suggestions.

items.question: What languages are supported?
items.answer: VoiceJournal AI currently supports French as the primary language for voice recording, transcription, and AI analysis. More languages are coming soon.

items.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
items.answer: Yes! You can cancel your Pro subscription at any time through the App Store or Google Play. You'll keep Pro access until the end of your billing period.

items.question: How long can my journal entries be?
items.answer: Each recording session can be between 10 seconds and 10 minutes. We recommend 2-3 minutes for the best AI analysis. Most users find this is the sweet spot.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: The Free plan gives you 3 entries per week with basic emotion analysis, daily prompts, and badges — forever. When you upgrade to Pro, you also get a 7-day free trial to explore all premium features.

cta.title: Ready to understand
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of people who journal with their voice. Start for free today — no credit card required.

footer.description: Your AI-powered voice journal for emotional self-awareness.
